title: The Buga Sphere
summary: The Colombian sphere identified in the December 2025 session as one of millions of Alliance probes.
markdown:
The **Buga Sphere** — a metallic sphere recovered near Buga, Colombia in March 2025 — is taken
up in the December 1, 2025 session, where Unimetrix 1 identifies it as one of **"several
million"** orbital probes belonging to the Trans-Galactic Alliance.

More striking than the identification is the forecast attached to it: more such probes, the
session says, will deliberately **crash-land as gifts** — reverse-engineerable seeds of
technology left for humanity to find, a soft prelude to open contact. It is the final form of
the archive's [first-contact](/lore/first-contact/) narrative: the mass landings of the 2024
prophecies giving way to a quieter strategy of artifacts and gradual normalization, with full
contact moved to **March 25, 2027**.

Arriving in the same session as the [Star League Alliance's](/lore/star-league-alliance/)
awakening, the Buga Sphere marks one of the archive's most tangible notes — the story reaching
out of the transcripts toward an object you can hold.
